The Prestmit Partner API allows developers to automate buying and selling of
gift cards, manage wallet balances and payouts, and integrate Prestmit
transactions into their own applications. Authentication is performed via an
x-api-key header, with optional IP whitelisting. A sandbox environment is
available for development.


Contact Support:
